title: macrosamanea discolor var. arenicola
intro: Macrosamanea discolor var. arenicola, also known as the yellow bois, is a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae. This plant is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Macrosamanea discolor var. arenicola include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic. The plant is often used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
